name: Salahaldin International School Alexandria
description: A leading international school in Alexandria offering a rigorous curriculum with a focus on academic excellence and character development.

name: El-Nasr Girls' College
description: One of Alexandria's most respected girls' schools with a long tradition of academic excellence and leadership development.

name: Alexandria Language School
description: A prominent language school in Alexandria offering strong English and French programs alongside the national curriculum.

name: Schutz American School
description: Founded in 1924, Schutz is one of Egypt's oldest American schools, offering a US college-preparatory curriculum on a beautiful Mediterranean campus.

name: The British School of Alexandria
description: Offering the full Cambridge curriculum from Early Years through A-Levels, BSA provides a premium British education in Alexandria.

name: Victoria College
description: One of Egypt's most historic and prestigious schools, Victoria College has educated generations of Egypt's leaders since 1902.

name: Alexandria House of English
description: A specialized English-language institution in Alexandria offering a blend of international and national curricula for all ages.

name: Kaumeya Language School
description: A well-established national language school in Alexandria known for its bilingual program and strong community values.

name: Riada Language School
description: Riada Language School emphasizes sports, arts, and academics in a balanced environment that nurtures well-rounded students.

name: Pioneers Language School
description: Pioneers Language School in Alexandria focuses on producing confident, multilingual graduates prepared for higher education.
